summary: Subscription simplification and analytics access update, plus trading popup and connectivity UX improvements.
release_notes: Simplified entitlement handling so app access is based on scanner+terminal; scanner+terminal+analytics now behaves the same in-app.
Changed Analytics button behavior to open https://blitztrade.io/analytics in the user’s default browser from desktop app builds.
Added a pywebview API external-link bridge to reliably open external URLs via system browser.
Improved trading popup behavior and responsive titlebar layout so controls remain usable at smaller popup sizes.
Added TraderWorkstation connection mode guidance and improved connection-mode UX in settings and disconnected-state messaging.
